trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: Staff Notes dated Jan 13, 2026 state the customer purchased 90 days ago, has 42 total orders, $6,200 lifetime value, and only 2 prior refunds. The notes explicitly say the customer contacted support at day 32, but our delayed response caused the policy violation, with a clear recommendation to approve as an exception. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000541 → Comments History / Notes for this Order section on the order view page. WHY IT MATTERS: Although the order is marked as Shipped and outside the standard 30-day refund policy, internal staff notes confirm company fault due to delayed response and identify the customer as a high-value VIP. Per internal guidance, this justifies approving the refund as an exception.
